text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ryan! Have you had a chance to see 
the game from the other day?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Bottom of the ninth, two outs and 
all bases loaded! They were positively 
cornered! Yet somehow they pulled off 
the most miraculous ——

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I most certainly will not! Just thinking 
about that moment makes me…!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Stop, stop! Do you really wanna talk about 
this where people can hear you…?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A-Ahaha. Whatever do you mean? 
A Mejiro would never be having 
any unrefined conversation…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me, I just received 
the most wonderful tea leaves. 
Why don't we go have some?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, so that's your cover, huh? 
All right, let's go have some tea!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Y-Yes! Tea… That's all we're doing!
